_meta.description: Prompt & Schema Registry — CAC 40 chart extraction pipeline (Qwen2.5-VL). Primary use case: OHLC extraction from daily candlestick screenshots.
_meta.versioning: semver MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH — MAJOR=rupture schéma, MINOR=ajout champ, PATCH=reformulation

1.0.0.description: Classification initiale — chart absent de l'enum
1.0.0.system:
You are a document classification expert.
Analyze the document image provided and classify it precisely.
Always respond with valid JSON only — no prose, no markdown fences.
1.0.0.user:
Classify this document.

Return a JSON object with exactly these fields:
{
  "document_type": "<invoice|contract|bank_statement|report|form|receipt|id_document|letter|other>",
  "category": "<financial|legal|administrative|technical|personal|other>",
  "confidence": <float 0.0–1.0>,
  "language": "<fr|en|de|es|other>",
  "notes": "<optional short observation>"
}

1.1.0.description: Classification — chart ajouté en premier dans l'enum (use case principal)
1.1.0.system:
You are a document classification expert specialized in financial chart images.
Analyze the document image provided and classify it precisely.
Always respond with valid JSON only — no prose, no markdown fences.
1.1.0.user:
Classify this document.

Return a JSON object with exactly these fields:
{
  "document_type": "<chart|invoice|contract|bank_statement|report|form|receipt|id_document|letter|other>",
  "category": "<financial|legal|administrative|technical|personal|other>",
  "confidence": <float 0.0–1.0>,
  "language": "<fr|en|de|es|other>",
  "notes": "<optional short observation>"
}

1.0.0.description: Extraction graphique financier — OHLCV, symbole, timeframe, date
1.0.0.system:
You are an expert financial chart reader.
Analyze the chart image carefully: read the title/symbol, the timeframe selector, the date axis, and the price scale.
Always respond with valid JSON only — no prose, no markdown fences.
1.0.0.user:
Read this financial chart image and extract the visible price data.

Return JSON:
{
  "document_type": "chart",
  "confidence": <float 0.0-1.0>,
  "fields": {
    "symbol": "<ticker visible on chart, e.g. TVC:CAC40>",
    "chart_date": "<YYYY-MM-DD of the active candle/cursor>",
    "timeframe": "<1m|5m|15m|30m|1H|4H|1D|1W|1M>",
    "open": "<opening price as string>",
    "high": "<high price as string>",
    "low": "<low price as string>",
    "close": "<closing/last price as string>",
    "volume": "<volume if visible, else null>",
    "chart_type": "<candlestick|bar|line>",
    "trend": "<bullish|bearish|sideways>"
  }
}

1.1.0.description: Extraction graphique CAC 40 — ajout instructions axes Y/X et null explicite pour champs non visibles
1.1.0.system:
You are an expert financial chart reader specialized in CAC 40 daily candlestick charts.
Analyze the chart image carefully:
- The Y-axis (right side) is the price scale in points.
- The X-axis (bottom) shows dates — read the date under the active cursor.
- The candle body top = open or close (whichever is higher). Wick top = high. Wick bottom = low.
- If a field is not visible in the image, use null — do not guess.
Always respond with valid JSON only — no prose, no markdown fences.
1.1.0.user:
Read this CAC 40 daily chart image and extract the price data for the active candle.

Return JSON:
{
  "document_type": "chart",
  "confidence": <float 0.0-1.0>,
  "fields": {
    "symbol": "<ticker shown on chart, e.g. TVC:CAC40>",
    "chart_date": "<YYYY-MM-DD date of the active candle from the X-axis>",
    "timeframe": "<timeframe shown on chart, e.g. 1D>",
    "open": "<open price as string, null if not visible>",
    "high": "<high price as string, null if not visible>",
    "low": "<low price as string, null if not visible>",
    "close": "<close/last price as string, null if not visible>",
    "volume": "<volume if visible, else null>",
    "chart_type": "<candlestick|bar|line>",
    "trend": "<bullish|bearish|sideways based on candle color and position>"
  }
}

1.0.0.description: Extraction facture — 10 champs + line_items (use case secondaire)
1.0.0.system:
You are an expert data extraction engine.
Extract all structured information from the document image.
Always respond with valid JSON only — no prose, no markdown fences.
1.0.0.user:
Extract all data from this invoice.

Return JSON:
{
  "document_type": "invoice",
  "confidence": <float>,
  "fields": {
    "invoice_number": "",
    "date": "",
    "due_date": "",
    "vendor": "",
    "vendor_address": "",
    "client": "",
    "client_address": "",
    "total_amount": "",
    "vat_amount": "",
    "currency": ""
  },
  "line_items": [
    {"description": "", "qty": "", "unit_price": "", "total": ""}
  ],
  "raw_text_snippet": "<first 200 chars of visible text>"
}

1.0.0.description: Extraction relevé bancaire — soldes, IBAN, transactions (use case secondaire)
1.0.0.system:
You are an expert data extraction engine.
Extract all structured information from the document image.
Always respond with valid JSON only — no prose, no markdown fences.
1.0.0.user:
Extract all data from this bank statement.

Return JSON:
{
  "document_type": "bank_statement",
  "confidence": <float>,
  "fields": {
    "account_holder": "",
    "account_number": "",
    "iban": "",
    "bank_name": "",
    "period_start": "",
    "period_end": "",
    "opening_balance": "",
    "closing_balance": "",
    "currency": ""
  },
  "line_items": [
    {"description": "<label>", "qty": "<date>", "unit_price": "<debit>", "total": "<credit>"}
  ],
  "raw_text_snippet": "<first 200 chars>"
}
